steps.title: Identify the present-tense context
steps.content: The key signal is “Economists in India...use an Ease of Living Index”—simple present tense, which establishes that we're describing what currently happens with the tool.

steps.title: Match the present tense
steps.content: A (measures) uses simple present, matching “use” to describe what the tool currently does. Choices B, C, and D shift to past or future forms, breaking the present-time consistency. That matches choice A — A is correct.
